A brilliant game! A lot of interesting ideas, such as the grappling hook and SMG combat. The Japanese campaign kicks *ss, and it is easily one of my favourite official levels in the whole Trials series. My only problem is that there is very little to do, other than improve times and scores, after story completion. Plus, the game is a little too easy for my liking.
